description: Realistic side-scrolling action platformer character, base movement/action set: idle, run, jump-rise, fall, land, attack, hurt, death.

states.name: idle
states.action: Standing idle loop: subtle breathing, a tiny blink, and a very small body bob; essentially the same pose and facing in every frame. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Character faces right in a clean side profile in every frame.
Keep the pose, silhouette, and palette essentially identical between frames aside from the subtle idle motion.
Feet stay planted.
Do not show walking, running, jumping, attacking, or any large gesture.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: run
states.action: Rightward run cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right, viewed from the side.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw speed lines, dust clouds, floor shadows, motion trails, or detached motion effects.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: jump-rise
states.action: Jump takeoff: anticipation crouch through push-off, ending in a rising airborne pose. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Show only the anticipation-through-launch phase; do not include the airborne peak or descent.
Do not draw ground shadows, contact shadows, dust, or launch marks.
Keep the background outside the character perfectly flat chroma key.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: fall
states.action: Falling arc: airborne descent through pose only, from near the peak of the arc to just above the ground. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Show only the airborne descent phase; do not include touchdown or landing impact.
Do not draw ground shadows, contact shadows, dust, or landing marks.
Keep the background outside the character perfectly flat chroma key.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: land
states.action: Landing impact: a brief knee-bent crouch absorbing the fall, then settling back toward a standing stance. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Show the impact through knee bend and torso compression only.
Do not draw ground shadows, contact shadows, dust, or impact marks.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: attack
states.action: Melee attack: windup, strike, follow-through, and recovery through pose and an attached weapon/limb effect only. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Any weapon trail, slash mark, or impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached slash arcs, floating impact stars, or motion lines outside the silhouette.
Keep apparent scale and baseline stable within the row.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: hurt
states.action: Hit reaction: impact flinch, recoil, and recovery. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: Show impact through pose only: flinch, recoil, brief off-balance lean, then recovery.
Any attached impact flash or stars must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached stars, floating symbols, or separate impact bursts.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.

states.name: death
states.action: Death sequence: impact, stagger, collapse, and a held final defeated pose. Not a loop; the last frame is the resting end state. Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
requirements: The final frame must be a stable, held defeated pose suitable as an animation end state, not a mid-motion frame.
Any attached dust or impact effect must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached dust clouds, floating symbols, or ground cracks outside the silhouette.
Proportion-appropriate motion for realistic build: realistic stride length and anticipation, silhouette-first readability.
